message:
feat(core): Tantivy lexical schema and incremental ingestion pipeline (wa-oegrb.4.2)

Adds concrete Tantivy-backed schema, tokenizers, document conversion, and
incremental indexing from append-log checkpoints behind recorder-lexical feature.

- recorder_lexical_schema: 25-field schema, ft_terminal_text/symbols tokenizers,
  SHA-256 fingerprint for rebuild detection (14 tests)
- recorder_lexical_ingest: TantivyIndexWriterAdapter, LexicalIndexer with
  schema fingerprint verification, full IncrementalIndexer integration (13 tests)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
